美股與國際市場 ·

傳 SpaceX 六月前後掛牌、估值天價預期，Cramer 示警 IPO 狂熱與籌碼供給恐牽動全市Analyst flags SpaceX listing talk as a catalyst for IPO fever, stretched valuations, and fragile market balance

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460942

  • CNBC 節目主持人 Cramer 認為新股投機氣氛升溫，憂若 SpaceX 掛牌恐再把資金情緒推升並波及整體股市。
  • 外電傳最快近日提交上市文件、目標約六月 IPO，市場對其市值想像區間大致介於約 1.75 兆至 2 兆美元。
  • 他擔心若流通股極少，價格易迅速脫離基本面，甚至把總市值推到天價並形成自成一格的泡沫感。
  • 旗下事業涵蓋發射、衛星網路與平台等，若超大型掛牌成功，可能被視為 AI 與科技新股跟進上市的範本。
  • 他也提醒大型新股吸金可能迫使投資人賣出其他持股以調度資金，並呼籲承銷勿重複網路泡沫時人為炒作首日的做法。

Cramer 指市場已見 IPO 過熱跡象，若 SpaceX 依傳聞掛牌且流通股稀少，股價與總市值敘事易快速偏離基本面；他也擔心巨型新股吸金擠壓其他持股，並呼籲勿用刻意的手法製造首日暴漲。

  • Host Jim Cramer says IPO speculation is heating up and a SpaceX debut could widen risk beyond that single name.
  • Reports point to a near-term filing and a possible June IPO; headline valuation bands sit near $1.75T–$2T.
  • He warns a very small float can detach prices from fundamentals and push market-cap narratives into bubble territory.
  • A blockbuster listing could set a template for peers eyeing public markets after heavy private funding.
  • Mega deals may crowd out other stocks as investors free cash; he urges underwriting restraint versus staged first-day pops.

Cramer warns IPO hype and a scarce SpaceX float could detach prices from fundamentals; mega listings may crowd out other stocks, so he urges sober un…
